Talks are continuing today and a fee of £8m is being discussed for the central defender. Fonte has handed in a transfer request and has been told he can leave Southampton this month.

ULLOA MAKES TRANSFER REQUEST

Leicester City striker Leonardo Ulloa has handed in a formal transfer request, to try to force through a move to Alaves.

Sky sources understand Leicester want to keep Ulloa, and were prepared to discuss a new contract with the Argentinian, who has 18 months left on his current deal.

But the striker has decided his future lies away from King Power Stadium, whatever offer comes back, after making just one Premier League start all season.

It's thought Alaves' offer is the only one that's come forward so far, and it's well below Leicester's valuation of the player. Leicester turned down a £9m bid from Swansea for him in the summer.

STOKE MAKE BERAHINO PROGRESS

Sky Sources understand negotiations between Stoke City and West Bromwich Albion are progressing well over the possible transfer of Saido Berahino.

Sky Sports News HQ reported 10 days ago that Stoke had made a bid for the striker. Now Albion have responded and re-engaged with talks. A fee hasn't yet been agreed, but both sides are getting closer, we've been told.

IGHALO MOVE DEPENDS ON BERAHINO

One senior source has told Sky Sports News HQ that West Brom's interest in Watford striker Odion Ighalo is very much dependent on the club first agreeing a deal for Saido Berahino to leave.

Tony Pulis is keen to add Ighalo to his squad, but West Brom aren't prepared to pay the £17m price that Watford reportedly want.
